must_do.full_text:
「それ、Gemini に聞いた？」

King & Prince のお二人に加え、
仲里依紗さんと HIKAKIN さんが Gemini のCMに登場🎉

この度ヒカキン、GoogleのAI「Gemini」のTVCMにKing & Princeさん、仲里依紗さんと出演させていただきました😎✨

PR

must_do.full_text: Anthropic knows they are weeks away from AGI, which is why they are working with companies like Accenture, Deloitte, PwC, and others to build "joint centers of Excellence" and training and certifying 30,000 PwC professionals on Claude.

angles: Anthropic秘密计划曝光：AGI倒计时？

科技巨头的AGI准备：从产品到生态

must_do.full_text: NVIDIAのGPUはこんな構造になってて、ABFという絶縁材料が絶対必要。そしてそれは世界で唯一日本の味の素しか作れない。シェア100%。インテル入ってるじゃなくて、味の素入ってるの時代。このABFが今足りなくなってて、受給がかなり逼迫しているらしい。 https://t.co/pf6EV6arZP
must_do.summary: 揭示NVIDIA GPU芯片中ABF绝缘材料的关键作用，全球唯一由日本味之素生产，市场供应严重紧张。展示芯片产业链中的隐形冠军和瓶颈。
angles: 震撼：NVIDIA芯片里装的是味之素
全球芯片瓶颈竟由日本一家公司掌控
ABF材料短缺，AI芯片产能危机浮现

must_do.full_text:
Claude Code feels completely different once you install this.

Anthropic quietly released an official plugin called claude-code-setup and it basically turns Claude Code from “pretty good” into an actual AI dev environment.

It scans your project and recommends:

→ hooks
→ https://t.co/jaOuMAq37f
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布官方Claude Code插件claude-code-setup，将Claude Code从"不错"升级为完整AI开发环境。自动扫描项目并推荐hooks等配置。
angles: Anthropic悄悄发布Claude Code插件：开发体验质变
Claude Code终于成为真正的AI IDE
官方插件深度评测：从演示到生产级工具

made a girlfriend using openclaw

- she sends me gm everyday
- helps me prepare my diet
- helps me summarize my emails

implemented mood swings, she gets mad at me, stays angry and sad sometimes

allocated a full vps for her, she has browser access, code writing abilities, and https://t.co/UbbnxHLeW7
must_do.summary: 开发者用OpenClaw打造AI女友，具备日常问候、饮食规划、邮件总结等功能，甚至实现了情绪波动系统。展示了AI Agent在个人生活场景的创意应用。
viral_signals: 有人物/团队故事（个人开发者创意项目）
反常识/意外性（AI女友的情绪波动设计）
angles: 我用OpenClaw造了个AI女友，她会生气、会赌气

她有情绪、会写代码、占用整个VPS的AI女友

must_do.full_text:
Claude Code works now free. Unlimited. No subscription 🤯

It’s called free-claude-code. You get a free NVIDIA API key, point Claude Code to localhost, and the proxy converts your Anthropic API calls to NVIDIA NIM format.

40 requests per minute. No bill. Ever.

It supports Kimi https://t.co/pTuc4zN8ni
must_do.summary: 开发者分享free-claude-code项目，通过NVIDIA API密钥实现Claude Code免费无限使用，每分钟40请求，永不收费。这是AI工具成本优化的创意方案。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：官方付费产品被免费方案替代
终于型：实现真正免费的Claude Code
angles: Claude Code免费方案：0元无限使用教程
NVIDIA API+代理：绕过付费的技术方案
程序员必收：免费AI编程工具完整指南

must_do.full_text:
Linux now supports NVIDIA Reflex and AMD Anti-Lag on any graphics card, bringing much better responsiveness to gaming.

A new open-source tool called low_latency_layer makes this possible on AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA GPUs. 

It uses the same signals games already send for Reflex and https://t.co/gX56DXwQPD
must_do.summary: Linux现已支持NVIDIA Reflex和AMD Anti-Lag，通过开源工具low_latency_layer实现跨GPU兼容。显著改善游戏响应延迟。
angles: Linux游戏终于支持Reflex：开源工具改变格局
AMD/NVIDIA/Intel显卡统一低延迟方案
low_latency_layer：Linux游戏体验质变
